description_long: This is a sleek, black coupe car with a low, aerodynamic profile and a convertible roof. The car features bold, angular lightning bolt graphics along its sides, enhancing its sporty and aggressive appearance. The front end is characterized by a wide, slightly curved hood, sharp headlights, and a pronounced front bumper. The interior is visible and includes two white bucket seats, a detailed dashboard, and a steering wheel, all set within a compact cabin. The rear showcases a prominent spoiler, dual exhausts, and a transparent engine cover, suggesting a high-performance design. The wheels are large, multi-spoke alloys with low-profile tires, further emphasizing its racing-inspired aesthetic.
description: A black, convertible coupe car with lightning bolt graphics, sporty wheels, and a visible two-seat interior. Features include a rear spoiler, dual exhausts, and a transparent engine cover.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide hood, sharp headlights, and windshield with visible interior seats.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the lightning bolt graphics, open convertible roof, and detailed wheel design.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the spoiler, dual exhausts, transparent engine cover, and license plate.
description_view_3: Right side view with matching lightning bolt graphics, open roof, and visible interior details.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
